title: U.S., Iran intensify attacks as ceasefire frays, peace talks stall
summary_full: The regional conflict has hardened into a stalemate as the U.S. and Iran failed to turn a fragile ceasefire into a lasting peace deal.
summary_public: The regional conflict has hardened into a stalemate as the U.S. and Iran failed to turn a fragile ceasefire into a lasting peace deal.

IR.label: negative
